name: Sangrita
recipeIngredient: 4 small Celery stalks with leafy tops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a one-quart container, combine the tomato juice, orange juice, lime juice, finely minced onion, salt, and Tobasco sauce. Cover tightly and refrigerate for 2 hours to allow the flavors to blend.
2. Pour into ice-filled tumblers. Add a celery stalk as a stirrer.
